coreCompetencies: Basic understanding of governance, risk and compliance concepts
Familiarity with ISO 27001 structure and Annex A controls
Ability to gather evidence for audits under supervision
Elementary knowledge of the GDPR and personal data principles
Support in maintaining the risk register
Ability to document policies and procedures from templates
Understanding of the difference between policy, standard and control
Awareness of security awareness training programmes
complementaryCompetencies: Familiarity with SOC 2 trust service criteria
Basic knowledge of spreadsheet-based control tracking
Understanding of the confidentiality, integrity and availability triad

coreCompetencies: Ability to perform qualitative risk assessments with guidance
Mapping of controls to ISO 27001 Annex A and SOC 2 criteria
Collection and validation of evidence for internal audits
Drafting of security policies aligned with a control framework
Support in GDPR records of processing activities
Maintenance of the risk register and treatment plans
Coordination of security awareness campaigns
Tracking of remediation actions to closure
complementaryCompetencies: Familiarity with the ENS (Esquema Nacional de Seguridad) control set
Knowledge of GRC tooling such as Vanta or Drata
Understanding of third-party questionnaires
indicators: Owns evidence collection for a control area

coreCompetencies: Execution of risk assessments using a defined methodology
Ownership of a control domain within ISO 27001 or SOC 2
Preparation and coordination of internal audits

Management of the vendor risk assessment process
Design and delivery of role-based awareness training
Reporting of control status and open findings to managers

Familiarity with control automation and continuous monitoring
Understanding of business continuity and disaster recovery plans
indicators: Mentors trainees on evidence and controls

coreCompetencies: Autonomous ownership of an ISO 27001 or SOC 2 certification cycle

Leadership of third-party audits as the main point of contact
Definition of the control framework mapped across ISO 27001, SOC 2 and ENS

Advising teams on GDPR and data protection by design obligations

Design of the security awareness and phishing simulation programme
complementaryCompetencies: Experience mapping NIS2 and DORA obligations to existing controls
Knowledge of control automation platforms and evidence pipelines
Ability to translate technical findings into business risk
indicators: Is a reference for risk and compliance practices

Experience with GRC platforms and control automation at scale
